sections.paragraph:
συγχέω - sugcheō - soong-kheh'-o

Or συγχύνω sugchunō soong-khoo'-no

From G4862 and χέω “cheō” (to pour) or its alternate; to commingle promiscuously, that is, (figuratively) to throw (an assembly) into disorder, to perplex (the mind): - confound, confuse, stir up, be in an uproar.
